headline: Swiss Digital Pact launches popular initiative to enshrine digital security in the Constitution
summary: The association Swiss Digital Pact launched a federal popular initiative for Switzerland's digital security, resilience and sovereignty.

headline: Swiss April foreign-trade figures: pharma exports slip, watches and machinery rise
summary: April customs statistics show falling pharma/chemicals exports offsetting gains elsewhere, with machinery/electronics strongest.

headline: Swiss second-pillar: retirees chose lump sum over annuity for first time as crediting-rate gaps widen
summary: Swisscanto pension study finds 2025 was the first year more savers took capital than annuity, with widening differences between funds.

headline: Vaud animal-cruelty case uncovered at a pig-breeding operation
summary: A case of animal cruelty in pig farming was uncovered in canton Vaud.

headline: Crans-Montana fire probe: ex-attorney-general Lauber calls handling a major failing
summary: Former federal attorney-general Michael Lauber criticises the investigation into the Crans-Montana fire disaster as a big failing.

headline: Russia launches largest aerial barrage on Ukraine, killing 17
summary: Russia fired 73 missiles and 656 drones including eight Zircon hypersonics at Ukraine, killing at least 17, with Kyiv the main target.

headline: Israel kills 8 in Lebanon a day after Trump declared de-escalation
summary: Israeli drone strikes killed eight in southern Lebanon despite Trump saying Israel and Hezbollah agreed to stop fighting; Iran suspended talks.

headline: WMO says El Niño now near-certain and at least moderate
summary: The World Meteorological Organization put El Niño likelihood at ~80% for June-August 2026, at least moderate, warning of extreme weather.

headline: India-Nepal border dispute flares again
summary: Tensions rise over a contested stretch of the India-Nepal border around Kalapani/Lipulekh.

headline: Historian: Trump has lost his standoff with Iran
summary: IHEID historian Cyrus Schayegh analyses US-Iran negotiations to end the war launched February 28.

headline: CVE-2026-8206: Kirki WordPress plugin account-takeover, CVSS 9.8
summary: Kirki page-builder plugin 6.0.0-6.0.6 allows unauthenticated account takeover via password-reset email manipulation.

headline: CISA adds Oracle WebLogic CVE-2024-21182 to KEV
summary: Oracle WebLogic Server T3/IIOP unauthenticated vulnerability added to CISA KEV for active exploitation.

headline: CVE-2026-1784: OpenShift Route/HAProxy flaw, CVSS 8.8
summary: OpenShift Route resource flaw via HAProxy enables impact on cluster pods.

headline: AI/MLOps tooling vulnerabilities cluster in today's NVD batch
summary: Multiple CVEs in MLflow, Prefect, MetaGPT and NousResearch hermes-agent show AI pipeline tooling gaining attacker attention.

headline: CVE-2026-8293: Really Simple Security WordPress plugin 2FA bypass, CVSS 7.5
summary: Really Simple Security before 9.5.10.1 fails to enforce the second-factor challenge on two authentication paths.

headline: Extortion-only ransomware now the norm; multiple new victims posted
summary: Threat actors shift from encryption to data-theft extortion; DragonForce, Qilin, Play and INC posted fresh victims June 2.

headline: ART: Attention Run-time Termination for efficient LLM decoding
summary: arXiv 2606.00024 proposes runtime termination of KV-cache block accesses using accumulated attention, cutting long-context memory bandwidth.

headline: SENSE: semantic-embedding retrieval-based speculative decoding
summary: arXiv 2606.00021 anchors retrieval speculative decoding on hidden states with soft-gated verification to fix lexical brittleness.

headline: FoLoRA: forgetting-aware LoRA preserves pretraining capabilities
summary: arXiv 2606.00132 regulates the adaptation-vs-preservation tradeoff during fine-tuning via a Rayleigh-quotient preservation penalty.

headline: Test-time prompt optimization for VLM reward models
summary: arXiv 2606.00083 uses expert demonstrations to optimize prompts for vision-language reward models, reducing false-positive rewards in robotics RL.

headline: TrustLDM: trustworthiness benchmark for language diffusion models
summary: arXiv 2606.00023 benchmarks safety, privacy and fairness of any-order language diffusion models versus autoregressive baselines.

headline: World Models: a comprehensive survey with a four-axis taxonomy
summary: arXiv 2606.00133 surveys world-model architectures, training, reasoning and applications across RL, robotics, driving and video generation.
